[ExamenU2.ipynb](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/29647684/ExamenU2.ipynb)# Documento Ypynb del documento en Google Colab





[Upl{

    },

  },
  "cells": [
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "# **Reporte Técnico: Inferencia Estadística de la Región de Loja**\n",
        "\n",
        "## **1. Pruebas de Hipótesis Unimuestrales**\n",
        "\n",
        "En esta sección, evaluamos si una variable crítica de la región de Loja se ajusta a una afirmación teórica o histórica.\n",
        "\n",
        "Definición del Problema\n",
        "\n",
        "Se afirma que la temperatura media histórica en la ciudad de Loja es de 16°C.\n",
        "Utilizaremos un dataset regional para validar esta premisa mediante una prueba T de Student para una muestra, dado que generalmente la varianza poblacional es desconocida.\n",
        "\n",
        "  Hipótesis:\n",
        "  \n",
        "  Hipótesis Nula (H0​ ): La media poblacional es igual a 16°C.\n",
        "  \n",
        "  H0​ :μ=16\n",
        "  \n",
        "  Hipótesis Alterna (H1​ ): La media poblacional es diferente de 16°C (Prueba\n",
        "  de dos colas).\n",
        "  \n",
        "  H1​ :μ!=16"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "V_-TyYLNUaLP"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "from scipy.stats import t\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "# Para este ejemplo, simulamos 50 mediciones de la región de Loja\n",
        "np.random.seed(42)\n",
        "datos_temp = np.random.normal(loc=15.8, scale=1.2, size=50)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 1. Cálculo de estadísticos para la gráfica\n",
        "media_temp = np.mean(datos_temp)\n",
        "n = len(datos_temp)\n",
        "error_est = np.std(datos_temp, ddof=1) / np.sqrt(n) # SE\n",
        "\n",
        "# 2. Cálculo del Intervalo de Confianza (IC) al 95%\n",
        "ic_inf, ic_sup = t.interval(0.95, df=n-1, loc=media_temp, scale=error_est)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 3. Generación de la gráfica de barras de error\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(6, 8))\n",
        "plt.errorbar(x=\"Temperatura Loja\", y=media_temp,\n",
        "             yerr=[[media_temp - ic_inf], [ic_sup - media_temp]],\n",
        "             fmt='o', color='blue', ecolor='green', capsize=10, label='Media con IC 95%')\n",
        "\n",
        "# Línea de la Hipótesis Nula (H0: μ = 16°C)\n",
        "plt.axhline(y=16, color='red', linestyle='--', label='H0: μ = 16°C')\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.title(\"Estimación de la Realidad Regional (Loja)\")\n",
        "plt.ylabel(\"Grados Celsius (°C)\")\n",
        "plt.legend()\n",
        "plt.grid(axis='y', alpha=0.3)\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 699
        },
        "id": "c_lwvzY9O9-_",
        "outputId": "460b0973-779a-411c-ee34-168747ec69d5"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 600x800 with 1 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "# **2. Comparación de Grupos (A/B Testing y ANOVA)**\n",
        "####**Para descubrir disparidades sistémicas, dividimos el dataset en subgrupos reales, como Sector Urbano y Sector Rural de Loja.**\n",
        "\n",
        "Definición del Problema\n",
        "\n",
        "Evaluaremos si existe una diferencia significativa en el ingreso promedio entre el sector urbano y rural de la región. Antes de comparar medias, debemos validar el supuesto de homocedasticidad (igualdad de varianzas) mediante el Test de Levene.\n",
        "\n",
        "Hipótesis del A/B Testing:\n",
        "\n",
        "Hipótesis Nula\n",
        "\n",
        "(H0): No hay diferencia entre las medias de ambos sectores.\n",
        "\n",
        "H0:μurbano=μrural\n",
        "\n",
        "Hipótesis Alterna\n",
        "\n",
        "(H1):Existe una diferencia significativa entre las medias.\n",
        "\n",
        "H1:μurbano!=μrural\n",
        "\n",
        "Hipótesis de ANOVA:\n",
        "\n",
        "H0:μ1=μ2= ⋯ =μk\n",
        "\n",
        "H1:∃μi != μj\n",
        "\n",
        "Estadístico F de ANOVA:\n",
        "\n",
        "![image.png](data:image/png;base64,)"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "uIg8bbI9U32t"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "import seaborn as sns\n",
        "from scipy.stats import f_oneway, levene\n",
        "from statsmodels.stats.multicomp import pairwise_tukeyhsd\n",
        "\n",
        "# 1. Preparación de datos (Simulación basada en los sectores de Loja)\n",
        "np.random.seed(42)\n",
        "df_loja = pd.DataFrame({\n",
        "    'Sector': ['Urbano']*30 + ['Rural']*30 + ['Periférico']*30,\n",
        "    'Ingreso': np.concatenate([\n",
        "        np.random.normal(580, 50, 30), # Sector Urbano\n",
        "        np.random.normal(490, 45, 30), # Sector Rural\n",
        "        np.random.normal(520, 48, 30)  # Sector Periférico\n",
        "    ])\n",
        "})\n",
        "\n",
        "# 2. Validación de Homocedasticidad (Test de Levene)\n",
        "sectores = df_loja['Sector'].unique()\n",
        "datos_por_sector = [df_loja[df_loja['Sector'] == s]['Ingreso'] for s in sectores]\n",
        "\n",
        "stat_lev, p_lev = levene(*datos_por_sector)\n",
        "print(f\"--- Validación de Supuestos ---\")\n",
        "print(f\"Valor-p de Levene: {p_lev:.4f} (Si p > 0.05, hay homocedasticidad)\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# 3. Ejecución de ANOVA de 1 Factor\n",
        "stat_f, p_anova = f_oneway(*datos_por_sector)\n",
        "print(f\"\\n--- Resultados de ANOVA ---\")\n",
        "print(f\"Estadístico F: {stat_f:.4f}\")\n",
        "print(f\"Valor-p: {p_anova:.4e}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# 4. Visualización Requerida: Boxplot con puntos individuales\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))\n",
        "sns.boxplot(x='Sector', y='Ingreso', data=df_loja, palette=\"Set2\")\n",
        "sns.stripplot(x='Sector', y='Ingreso', data=df_loja, color=\"black\", alpha=0.3)\n",
        "plt.title(f\"Análisis Multigrupo: Ingresos por Sector en Loja (p={p_anova:.2e})\")\n",
        "plt.grid(axis='y', alpha=0.3)\n",
        "plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "# 5. Prueba Post-Hoc de Tukey (Indispensable para la rúbrica si p < 0.05)\n",
        "if p_anova < 0.05:\n",
        "    print(\"\\n--- Prueba Post-Hoc de Tukey ---\")\n",
        "    # Identifica qué sectores específicos son diferentes entre sí\n",
        "    tukey = pairwise_tukeyhsd(endog=df_loja['Ingreso'], groups=df_loja['Sector'], alpha=0.05)\n",
        "    print(tukey)\n",
        "else:\n",
        "    print(\"\\nNo se detectaron diferencias significativas entre los grupos.\")"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 929
        },
        "id": "HgKlQpjmGR02",
        "outputId": "532444ad-e491-4d0a-9d5a-90fe98fca5ad"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "--- Validación de Supuestos ---\n",
            "Valor-p de Levene: 0.9411 (Si p > 0.05, hay homocedasticidad)\n",
            "\n",
            "--- Resultados de ANOVA ---\n",
            "Estadístico F: 27.7842\n",
            "Valor-p: 4.6673e-10\n"
          ]
        },
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stderr",
          "text": [
            "/tmp/ipykernel_26509/3422229413.py:36: FutureWarning: \n",
            "\n",
            "Passing `palette` without assigning `hue` is deprecated and will be removed in v0.14.0. Assign the `x` variable to `hue` and set `legend=False` for the same effect.\n",
            "\n",
            "  sns.boxplot(x='Sector', y='Ingreso', data=df_loja, palette=\"Set2\")\n"
          ]
        },
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 1000x600 with 1 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        },
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "\n",
            "--- Prueba Post-Hoc de Tukey ---\n",
            "   Multiple Comparison of Means - Tukey HSD, FWER=0.05   \n",
            "=========================================================\n",
            "  group1   group2 meandiff p-adj   lower    upper  reject\n",
            "---------------------------------------------------------\n",
            "Periférico  Rural -36.0708  0.007 -63.7139 -8.4277   True\n",
            "Periférico Urbano  49.9742 0.0001  22.3311 77.6173   True\n",
            "     Rural Urbano   86.045    0.0  58.4019 113.688   True\n",
            "---------------------------------------------------------\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
